item.title: charles_watts: Charles Watts @charles_watts · 37s Martinelli fizzes one over from the edge of the box. Tough chance with the ball bounc
item.description:
Charles Watts @charles_watts · 37s Martinelli fizzes one over from the edge of the box. Tough chance with the ball bouncing.
First change of the evening. Havertz on for Gyokeres. 1 35 776

item.title: ed_aarons: Ed Aarons @ed_aarons · 7min Arteta was having a long chat with Kai Havertz before he goes out to warm up. Won’t be surpr
item.description: Ed Aarons @ed_aarons · 7min Arteta was having a long chat with Kai Havertz before he goes out to warm up. Won’t be surprised to see him coming on soon 2 8 1 mil
